markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

Weekly sync between ProjectMark and GrowthX to discuss SEO progress, content strategy, and next steps.

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO efforts showing initial traction: 6,000 impressions, 40 clicks since Sept 4th; 25 organic leads generated (17 in November alone)](https://fathom.video/share/5v_acz5WSYGjzAMp17YaxKB7r_Asd_2W?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - Shifting content strategy: 60-70% top-of-funnel, 30-40% middle/bottom-of-funnel to increase traffic and impressions
  - Publishing frequency and process improvements needed to accelerate growth and identify high-performing content angles

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [6,000 impressions, 40 clicks since September 4th](https://fathom.video/share/5v_acz5WSYGjzAMp17YaxKB7r_Asd_2W?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Best performing blog: "Instructions Sales Process" (8 clicks, 2,000+ impressions)](https://fathom.video/share/5v_acz5WSYGjzAMp17YaxKB7r_Asd_2W?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [25 organic leads generated (HubSpot data), with 17 in November alone](https://fathom.video/share/5v_acz5WSYGjzAMp17YaxKB7r_Asd_2W?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Current performance focused on valuable bottom-of-funnel traffic](https://fathom.video/share/5v_acz5WSYGjzAMp17YaxKB7r_Asd_2W?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Agreed to adjust content mix: 60-70% top-of-funnel, 30-40% middle/bottom-of-funnel](https://fathom.video/share/5v_acz5WSYGjzAMp17YaxKB7r_Asd_2W?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Goal: Increase overall traffic while maintaining valuable targeted content](https://fathom.video/share/5v_acz5WSYGjzAMp17YaxKB7r_Asd_2W?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [Example keyword progression: "What is CRM software" (top) → "Best CRM tools" (middle) → "Buy CRM tools" (bottom)](https://fathom.video/share/5v_acz5WSYGjzAMp17YaxKB7r_Asd_2W?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)

### Publishing Process Improvements

  - [Expedite content approval process, especially for top-of-funnel pieces](https://fathom.video/share/5v_acz5WSYGjzAMp17YaxKB7r_Asd_2W?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Publish articles more frequently to identify high-performing content angles](https://fathom.video/share/5v_acz5WSYGjzAMp17YaxKB7r_Asd_2W?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [Implement tagging system to manage blog homepage display](https://fathom.video/share/5v_acz5WSYGjzAMp17YaxKB7r_Asd_2W?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [Add publishing dates to articles for SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/5v_acz5WSYGjzAMp17YaxKB7r_Asd_2W?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [Schedule articles for consistent publishing (e.g., 5 per day, including weekends)](https://fathom.video/share/5v_acz5WSYGjzAMp17YaxKB7r_Asd_2W?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)

### Meta Description Optimization

  - [Identified need to improve meta descriptions for high-impression, low-click articles](https://fathom.video/share/5v_acz5WSYGjzAMp17YaxKB7r_Asd_2W?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [Example: "Ultimate Guide" article with 18,000 impressions but only 1 click](https://fathom.video/share/5v_acz5WSYGjzAMp17YaxKB7r_Asd_2W?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
  - [Team to review and optimize meta descriptions, especially for high-potential content](https://fathom.video/share/5v_acz5WSYGjzAMp17YaxKB7r_Asd_2W?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)

### Competitor Backlink Caution

  - [Be mindful of backlinking to competitor websites in content](https://fathom.video/share/5v_acz5WSYGjzAMp17YaxKB7r_Asd_2W?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement new content mix (60-70% top-of-funnel) in upcoming content batches](https://fathom.video/share/5v_acz5WSYGjzAMp17YaxKB7r_Asd_2W?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Review and publish pending draft articles to accelerate content output](https://fathom.video/share/5v_acz5WSYGjzAMp17YaxKB7r_Asd_2W?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Optimize meta descriptions for high-impression, low-click articles](https://fathom.video/share/5v_acz5WSYGjzAMp17YaxKB7r_Asd_2W?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
  - [Implement tagging system and add publishing dates to blog articles](https://fathom.video/share/5v_acz5WSYGjzAMp17YaxKB7r_Asd_2W?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [Set up consistent publishing schedule (e.g., 5 articles per day)](https://fathom.video/share/5v_acz5WSYGjzAMp17YaxKB7r_Asd_2W?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)
  - [ProjectMark team to provide feedback on content quality trends for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/5v_acz5WSYGjzAMp17YaxKB7r_Asd_2W?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
